race.comment: MISS FREELOVE (5) made a long, sustained run to just get up in time in the Listed Denise's Joy over 1100m at Scone last start when second-up from a spell. No placings in two third-up runs is the query but her last effort was a career-high, so she is worth following. AGARWOOD (6) led and gave a kick but her condition gave out late in the piece in the Denise's Joy. That was her first run for six weeks - should tighten up and off a bit more in the closing stages this time. FOREIGN PRESS (7) went forward from a wide gate then battled on gamely for second behind EARN TO BURN when resuming over 1110m at Doomben recently. Won at Listed level over 1200m last prep so the extra trip is ideal. PLATINUM PANTHEON (2) has been just behind the placegetters in two Group 3 races since coming from NZ. Has a fine record at this trip, but the wide gate makes it tough. Each-way the best option. SYLPH (8) won her maiden last start at the Gold Coast. Three times stakes placed so she is up to this.
